name: dj-ramu-kaka
description: Discord music bot monorepo — web, API, bot, Lavalink (see init.md)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,bot,web,lava -c blue,magenta,green,yellow "npm run dev -w @music-bot/api" "npm run dev -w @music-bot/bot" "npm run dev -w @music-bot/web" "node scripts/run-lavalink.js"
scripts.dev:no-lava: concurrently -n api,bot,web -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev -w @music-bot/api" "npm run dev -w @music-bot/bot" "npm run dev -w @music-bot/web"
